snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Production Ready Permission Broker current-action core exact-hash ACCEPTED/CLEAR
reviewers.independence: UI Design independently verified exact Development patch b56b558d9980ddd4d0352b80208304fed517c98362a6ba62592bed81c527ddda and returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR without edits: Deny/Allow once only, one matching status owner, safe localized summaries, durable uncertainty reread, stale identity guards, resolving semantics, six locales, accessibility and narrow layout. Product Planning independently bound Owner, acceptance and residual facts without changing the 28 Development paths.

dimensions.summary: One compact current-action card owns the pending decision, suppresses only its matching Job, restores ordinary Job truth after resolution, and adds no settings page, grant manager, YOLO flow or navigation branch.

Security, Pi, Runtime Policy, API, Job, Architecture, UI, Quality, Playbook and Decision owners agree on capability-versus-authority, exact current-action binding, body-free machine-local lifecycle, one-use Job CAS and fail-closed restart.

Exact broker, Home, recovery, adapter, schema and UI selectors prove the bounded foundation, while PIGE-SEC-002, PIGE-PI-003 and E8.02 remain planned because no production external caller, grants, capacity or signed-platform matrix exists.

Development gets one executable current-action layer: exact request identity, Deny/Allow once, same-Job pause/resume, pre-effect revalidation, one-use completion marker and deterministic restart adoption without saved-grant or package breadth.

Existing owners, one superseding Decision, Playbook and trace surfaces absorb the user-directed authority model and exact implementation; no new document, dependency, setting, provider, prototype image or status promotion is introduced.

verification.evidence: The exact Permission Broker current-action candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npx vitest run tests/unit/permission-broker-service.test.ts tests/unit/permission-broker-home-agent.test.ts tests/unit/permission-broker-job-recovery.test.ts tests/unit/permissioned-external-capability-service.test.ts tests/unit/home-agent-conversation-ui.test.ts tests/unit/desktop-shell-contract.test.ts tests/unit/pi-agent-runtime-adapter.test.ts tests/unit/security-contract-schemas.test.ts
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 and negative fixtures pass; the 8-file / 126-test focused matrix proves exact binding, adversarial storage, one-use execution, restart reconciliation, safe IPC/UI, cancellation and completion-uncertain fail-closed behavior.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,184 claims. Planned targets truthfully distinguish the executable current-action foundation from missing production callers, grants, capacity and platform proof; every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.

LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after consolidating the authority model and current foundation in existing owners, without a new governed document, dependency, setting, saved-grant/YOLO implementation or unrelated feature breadth.

coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds strict Permission Action binding/lifecycle records and two IPC channels without changing dependencies, provider/model egress, Restore, saved grants, YOLO, settings, package/Skill lifecycle or public phase/status state. The production external adapter registry remains empty.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 28-path b56b558d after full, assembled restart/allow/deny, package and adversarial evidence. UI Design returned exact-hash ACCEPTED/CLEAR. Product Planning synchronized only affected authority, API, Job, Pi, UI, quality, Decision and planned acceptance surfaces; the separate Pi autonomous-delivery lane remains unpublished for post-merge rebase.

nonBlockingRisks: The production external adapter registry is empty; assembled injection proves the Broker core, not a shipped arbitrary-path, Skill, package or local-tool capability.
Saved grants, Remember, YOLO, grant revocation/provenance, Permission settings and broader actor/package lifecycle remain open.
Broker record capacity/compaction and broader cross-process concurrency remain open.
The final path-based link/rename/unlink syscall TOCTOU interval remains a platform primitive boundary.
Signed installed Windows/macOS and real production-caller matrices remain open.
